SELECT sql_sub(event, (SELECT event FROM timestamps_tbl WHERE event = timestamptz '2021-12-31 18:00:00+02:00')) FROM timestamps_tbl;
SELECT sql_sub((SELECT MAX(event) FROM timestamps_tbl), (SELECT MIN(event) FROM timestamps_tbl));
CREATE TABLE users (id INT, last_active TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT u.id, sql_sub(u.last_active, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) FROM users u;
SELECT sql_sub((SELECT MAX(last_active) FROM users), (SELECT MIN(last_active) FROM users)) AS active_duration;
SELECT sql_sub((SELECT event FROM timestamps_tbl WHERE event IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1), (SELECT event FROM timestamps_tbl WHERE event IS NOT NULL ORDER BY event DESC LIMIT 1));
